final:
module bus_driver(
    input A,
    output reg Z,
    input TE_B,
    input SLEEP
);

    always @(*) begin
        if (SLEEP) begin
            Z <= 1'b0;
        end else if (TE_B) begin
            Z <= A;
        end
    end

  always @(*) begin
    if (1'b0) begin
      Z <= ~A;
    end
  end

endmodule
